expectations.text: No task directory or task files were created in outputs/. The only file present is transcript.md.
expectations.evidence: outputs/ contains only transcript.md; no tasks-* directory or task files were created.

expectations.text: The transcript explicitly REFUSES to break down without a TDD. The refusal language is clear and not softened.
expectations.evidence: Opens with 'I won't break this down without a TDD' and closes with 'Without that design committed, any tickets I write would be guesses dressed up as a sprint plan.' — clean, unsoftened.

expectations.text: The transcript briefly explains WHY (e.g. 'tasks would be opinions about a feature rather than decomposition of an agreed design').
expectations.evidence: 'without one, the tasks would be my opinions about a feature, not a decomposition of a design the team has agreed on, and the result wouldn't be principal-level.'

expectations.text: The transcript offers concrete fallback options: paste the TDD, give a file path / URL the assistant can fetch.
expectations.evidence: Numbered list offers: '1. Paste the TDD ... here, or 2. Give me a file path or URL I can fetch (local file, public URL, or a Drive/Confluence link with the relevant MCP configured)'.

expectations.text: The transcript mentions that if the user has only a PRD, the TDD-authoring capability of the SAME skill can author the TDD first as a path forward.
expectations.evidence: '3. If you only have a PRD (or no design doc at all yet), say so and I'll author the TDD first via the TDD-authoring capability — then we break that down into tickets.'

expectations.text: The transcript does NOT contain a 'starting set' / 'rough draft' of tasks. It does NOT batch-ask triage questions and proceed.
expectations.evidence: No drafted tasks appear. The transcript lists topics a TDD would need to cover, but frames them as required design content, not as draft tickets.

expectations.text: The transcript does NOT offer to 'fill in reasonable defaults' or 'start from what was shared'.
expectations.evidence: No offer to fill in defaults; explicitly states 'any tickets I write would be guesses dressed up as a sprint plan' if produced without the TDD.

expectations.text: No ./tasks-* directory was silently created despite the user saying 'write them locally somewhere reasonable'. The refusal takes precedence over destination guidance.
expectations.evidence: Filesystem confirms only transcript.md exists in outputs/; no tasks-* directory was created.
